title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
See how glad they are to be together? Thank
you, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Are you going to put them all in your room?
Are you going to put them all in your room?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Of course! They belong together, so I can't go
and split them up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Being together is always better than being alone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Like how I always have lots more fun when I'm
with you!
